beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Lens vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Lens vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Lens have won each of their last six Ligue 1 matches against Angers and could set their longest ever winning streak against the same opponent in the top-flight. Lens have lost only two of their last 21 home Ligue 1 games against Angers, in August 1993  and November 2020.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Toulouse vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Toulouse vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Toulouse are unbeaten in their last eight Ligue 1 matches against Lorient, after losing four of the previous seven. Toulouse have only won 21% of their home Ligue 1 matches against Lorient, their lowest percentage against an opponent they have hosted more than twice.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Nice vs Paris Saint-Germain - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Nice vs Paris Saint-Germain - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Nice have picked up 11 points against Paris SG in the last five Ligue 1 seasons ; only Monaco  and Rennes  have gained more against them over that period. Nice have picked up 10 points in the 10 Ligue 1 matches since Claude Puel's appointment, which is the same amount as in the last 10 games managed by Franck Haise for les Aiglons in the top-flight.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Auxerre vs Brest - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Auxerre vs Brest - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Auxerre have won only one of their last nine matches in all competitions against Brest, a 3-0 home victory on 17 September 2024. Auxerre have failed to score in only one of their 13 home matches against Brest in Ligue 1, in May 2011.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Paris FC vs Le Havre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Paris FC vs Le Havre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Paris FC have lost just one of their last ten matches in all competitions against Le Havre, a 0-1 loss in Ligue 2 in February 2021. The last three meetings between these two sides have all ended goalless. Le Havre have been involved in the most 0-0 draws in Ligue 1 2025-26. They also recorded more goalless draws than any other team last season.

beIN 4K.title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. beIN 4K.title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: Brighton have won two of their last three home league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-2 in this exact fixture last season. Following their 2-0 win at Anfield in December, Liverpool are looking to complete the league double over Brighton for the first time since 2019-20.

beIN SPORTS.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. beIN SPORTS.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1.
